sect1.title: Safety
sect1.para: buffer must point to capacity writable bytes and out_len must be a valid writable pointer when non-null.

sect1.title: Safety
sect1.para: items must either be null or point to count byte buffers allocated by this ABI.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *dataset_dir, uintptr_t dataset_dir_len, const char *index_path, uintptr_t index_path_len, struct cjx_index_t **out_index)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_open

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, bool has_after_record_id, int64_t after_record_id, uintptr_t limit, struct cjx_package_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_package_ref_page_after_record_id

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, bool has_after_record_id, int64_t after_record_id, uintptr_t limit, struct cjx_cityobject_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_cityobject_ref_page_after_record_id

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, struct cjx_bounds2d_t bbox, bool has_after_record_id, int64_t after_record_id, uintptr_t limit, struct cjx_package_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_query_package_refs_page

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, struct cjx_bounds2d_t bbox, bool has_after_record_id, int64_t after_record_id, uintptr_t limit, struct cjx_cityobject_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_query_cityobject_refs_page

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, int64_t record_id, bool *out_found, struct cjx_package_ref_t *out_ref)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_lookup_package_ref_by_record_id

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, const char *external_id, uintptr_t external_id_len, struct cjx_cityobject_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_lookup_cityobject_refs

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, const struct cjx_cityobject_ref_t *cityobject, struct cjx_package_ref_t **out_refs, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_package_refs_for_cityobject

sect1.title: Safety
sect1.para: refs must either be null or point to count CityObject refs allocated by this ABI.

sect1.title: Safety
sect1.para: refs must either be null or point to count package refs allocated by this ABI.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, const struct cjx_package_ref_t *package, cj_bytes_t *out_bytes)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_read_package_model_bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, int64_t record_id, bool *out_found, cj_bytes_t *out_bytes)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_read_package_by_record_id_model_bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, const struct cjx_package_ref_t *refs, uintptr_t ref_count, cj_bytes_t **out_items, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_read_packages_model_bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct cjx_index_t *handle, const struct cjx_package_ref_t *refs, uintptr_t ref_count, const struct cjx_package_filter_t *filter, struct cjx_filtered_package_t **out_packages, uintptr_t *out_count)
memberdef.name: cjx_index_read_filtered_packages

sect1.title: Safety
sect1.para: packages must either be null or point to count filtered packages allocated by cjx_index_read_filtered_packages.
